# TexFrame.HasDistinctInner property

True when the inner rect is structurally different from the outer rect — i.e. the engine authored a real trim / 9-slice-middle. False on the ~`83%` of frames where the two are identical, and on the degenerate-point cases where the engine did not author an inner region.

```csharp
public bool HasDistinctInner { get; }
```
